case_title: BEVERLY LASHLEY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO,A PUBLIC ENTITY et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-13-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-30-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SEP-13-2004 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. NOTE: FAILURE TO APPEAL WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL OF CASE BY THE COURT.
